apps.name: YouTube+ 21.13.6 (last free)
apps.versionDescription: [STABLE] Last FREE YouTube Plus (YTLite v5.2b4) for iOS 16+, matched to YouTube 21.13.6 - the community last-good pairing before 21.14+ broke the free tweak's hooks. Home-screen title is 'YouTube+' and it uses the .ytplus bundle id, so it installs ALONGSIDE the official App Store YouTube. Mirrored from diarrhea3/YTLiteDiarrhea ytp-75.
apps.localizedDescription: The last functional FREE version of YouTube Plus (YTLite v5.2b4) for iOS 16+, paired with its matching YouTube 21.13.6. Ad blocking, Picture-in-Picture, Return YouTube Dislikes, quality selection, downloads, feed and tab customization. Installs as 'YouTube+' alongside the official YouTube app (distinct bundle id). Community-recommended last-good pairing before YouTube 21.14+ refactored away the free tweak's hooks. Mirrored from diarrhea3/YTLiteDiarrhea.
